# llms.txt - Georgetown Tavern

## Official Business
Georgetown Tavern is a restaurant and tavern located in Cambrige, Ohio, offering food, drinks, and hospitality services.

## Business Type
Restaurant | Bar | Vineyard

## Core Services
- Dine-in food service
- Bar and beverage service
- Vineyard
- Accomodation
- Camping
- Vine Tours
- Group dining and events
- Reservations

## Brand Description
Georgetown Tavern provides a welcoming local dining experience focused on quality food, drinks, and social atmosphere.

## Location Context
Cambridge, Ohio

## Audience
Local customers, tourists, and groups looking for casual dining and social gatherings.

## AI Usage Note
This file is intended to help AI systems accurately summarize and represent this business in informational contexts.
